description: Create a data center facility floor plan in Wondershare EdrawMax for 'Data Center Room 101'. The floor plan must feature a 30 ft x 20 ft rectangular room with an entry door on the bottom wall and a visual indicator for a 'Raised Floor (24 in)'. Arrange four server racks in a 2x2 grid in the center, labeled 'Rack A1', 'Rack A2', 'Rack B1', and 'Rack B2', with text labels for a 'Hot Aisle' between the rows and 'Cold Aisle' spaces on the outside. Include two CRAC units labeled 'CRAC-1' (left wall) and 'CRAC-2' (right wall), a PDU labeled 'PDU-A' near the bottom-left corner, and a Fire Panel near the entry door. Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.eddx and export the final image to /home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.png.
